---
title: "Établi Atelier"
sidebar: en
---

<img src="../_icons/icon-atelier.svg" alt="" width="80" align="right" style="margin:0 0 1rem 1rem;">

<span class="etabli-badge">Flagship runtime</span>

> Run R and Python on your phone, fully offline.

Établi Atelier is a polyglot IDE that runs R (via WebR) and Python (via Pyodide) as switchable kernels inside an embedded WebAssembly runtime. Both kernels share a single virtual filesystem; `numpy`, `pandas`, `scipy`, `matplotlib` and `scikit-learn` come pre-bundled. Plots from base R, ggplot2 and matplotlib can be exported as PNG. No network, no account, no telemetry.

![Atelier — main view on Android](../_screens/android-main.png){width=320}

## Who benefits

Researchers, students and practitioners who write, review or demonstrate statistical and data-science code on the go — in the field, in classrooms without lab machines, or in environments with no internet at all.

## Platforms

| Platform | Status |
|----------|--------|
| iOS      | ✓      |
| Android  | ✓      |
| macOS    | ✓      |
| Linux    | ✓      |
| Windows  | ✓      |

## Privacy

No analytics, no third-party SDKs. The app runs fully offline; neither code nor data leaves the device. There are no accounts, no telemetry, no implicit network requests.

## Installation

Établi Atelier is **under active development**. There are no App Store, Google Play or F-Droid releases yet.

| Channel | Status |
|---------|--------|
| Android (APK) | **Development build** via [GitHub Releases](https://github.com/etabli-dev/etabli-atelier/releases) |
| App Store (iOS) | planned — not yet available |
| Google Play | planned — not yet available |
| F-Droid | planned — not yet available |
| Desktop (macOS, Windows, Linux) | build from source |

Details: see [Getting Started](getting-started.qmd).

## Support

If you find the app useful: [Liberapay](https://liberapay.com/rabanheller/) · inside the app you will also find a Buy-Me-a-Coffee link.
